name: claude-code-skills
description: Production-ready skill packages for Claude AI - 86 expert skills across marketing, engineering, product, C-level advisory, project management, regulatory compliance, business growth, and finance

metadata.description: 87+ production-ready skill packages across 9 domains: marketing, engineering, engineering-advanced, product, C-level advisory, project management, regulatory compliance, business growth, and finance

plugins.name: engineering-skills
plugins.description: 23 engineering skills: architecture, frontend, backend, fullstack, QA, DevOps, security, AI/ML, data engineering, Playwright, self-improving agent

plugins.name: engineering-advanced-skills
plugins.description: 25 POWERFUL-tier engineering skills: agent designer, RAG architect, database designer, migration architect, observability designer, dependency auditor, release manager, API reviewer, CI/CD pipeline builder, MCP server builder, skill security auditor, and more

plugins.name: product-skills
plugins.description: 8 product skills: product manager toolkit, agile product owner, product strategist, UX researcher, UI design system, and 3 more

plugins.name: c-level-skills
plugins.description: Complete virtual board of directors: 10 C-level advisory roles (CEO, CTO, COO, CPO, CMO, CFO, CRO, CISO, CHRO, Executive Mentor), 6 orchestration skills (Chief of Staff router, board meetings, decision logger, agent protocol, context engine, onboarding), 6 cross-cutting capabilities (board deck builder, scenario war room, competitive intel, org health, M&A playbook, international expansion), and 6 culture & collaboration frameworks. Features internal quality loop, two-layer memory, Phase 2 isolation, 25 Python tools, and structured communication standard. 28 skills total.

plugins.name: pm-skills
plugins.description: 6 project management skills: senior PM, scrum master, Jira expert, Confluence expert, Atlassian admin, template creator

plugins.name: ra-qm-skills
plugins.description: 12 regulatory affairs & quality management skills for HealthTech/MedTech: ISO 13485, MDR, FDA, GDPR, ISO 27001 compliance

plugins.name: business-growth-skills
plugins.description: 4 business & growth skills: customer success manager, sales engineer, revenue operations, and more

plugins.name: finance-skills

plugins.name: aws-architect

plugins.name: product-manager

plugins.name: scrum-master

plugins.name: skill-security-auditor
plugins.description: Security audit and vulnerability scanner for AI agent skills. Scans for malicious code, prompt injection, data exfiltration, supply chain risks, and privilege escalation before installation. Zero dependencies, PASS/WARN/FAIL verdicts with remediation guidance.

plugins.name: playwright-pro
plugins.description: Production-grade Playwright testing toolkit. 9 skills, 3 agents, 55 templates, TestRail + BrowserStack MCP integrations. Generate tests, fix flaky failures, migrate from Cypress/Selenium.

plugins.name: self-improving-agent
plugins.description: Curate auto-memory, promote learnings to CLAUDE.md and rules, extract patterns into skills.

plugins.name: marketing-skills
plugins.description: 42-skill marketing division: 7 pods (Content, SEO, CRO, Channels, Growth, Intelligence, Sales) + context foundation + orchestration router. 27 Python tools, 60 reference docs. All stdlib-only.
